creator: m.r.sopacua@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 178432
databases/postgis23: Add DOCS support

I often find it convenient to look at the documentation of the software version that is actually installed on the machine (as opposed to what's on the web). This patch adds a DOCS option to build / install the documentation and puts it in the standard DOCSDIR (html subdirectory).

The Makefile provided by upstream a) does not support DESTDIR and b) installs the docs in a directory belonging to another port (the postgresql*-server port) so COPYTREE_SHARE is used for installation.
Alterations to pkg-plist could handled by PORTDOCS=*. I'll leave that up to maintainer preference.
